ddls:
CREATE TABLE "radio_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radio station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the radio station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the radio station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number for the station */,
  "frequency_licenses" TEXT /* List of frequencies the station is licensed to use */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body the station is subject to */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last regulatory inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next regulatory inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radio station using the frequency */,
  "frequency_integer" INTEGER /* Integer part of the frequency value (e.g., 101 for 101.7) */,
  "frequency_fraction" INTEGER /* Fractional part of the frequency value (e.g., 7 for 101.7) */,
  "band" TEXT /* Band type of the frequency (AM, FM, XM) */,
  "rds_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the RDS data associated with the frequency */,
  "available_hds" INTEGER /* Number of available HD sub-channels */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the broadcast location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the broadcast location */,
  "transmit_power" REAL /* Transmit power in watts */,
  "antenna_height" INTEGER /* Height of the antenna in meters */,
  "antenna_type" TEXT /* Type of antenna used */,
  "transmission_range" INTEGER /* Range of the transmission in kilometers */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the frequency is currently active */,
  "last_config_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last configuration update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequencies_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES radio_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequencies_rds_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("rds_data_id") REFERENCES rds_data ("rds_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rds_data" (
  "rds_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RDS data entry */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the radio station */,
  "program_info" TEXT /* Program information (e.g., song title, artist) */,
  "traffic_announcement" INTEGER /* Indicates if a traffic announcement is in progress */,
  "clock_time" TEXT /* Current clock time broadcasted by the station */,
  "radio_text" TEXT /* Radio text (e.g., station slogan, current show name) */,
  "program_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the program */,
  "program_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the program */,
  "program_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in minutes */,
  "program_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the program (e.g., 5 out of 10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rds_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hd_subchannels" (
  "subchannel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HD sub-channel */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency the sub-channel belongs to */,
  "subchannel_number" INTEGER /* Number of the sub-channel (1, 2, 3) */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program broadcasted on the sub-channel */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sub-channel is currently active */,
  "program_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the program on the sub-channel */,
  "program_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the program on the sub-channel */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program on the sub-channel in minutes */,
  "program_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the program on the sub-channel */,
  "program_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the program on the sub-channel (e.g., 5 out of 10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subchannel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hd_subchannels_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency the configuration applies to */,
  "power_level" REAL /* Power level of the transmission */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Transmission mode (e.g., analog, digital) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the configuration */,
  "antenna_gain" REAL /* Antenna gain in dBi */,
  "modulation_type" TEXT /* Type of modulation used */,
  "transmission_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the transmission */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User who last reviewed the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_configurations_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration setting that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES frequency_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, content manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration setting */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration setting was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the configuration */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the configuration */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES frequency_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date the compliance was last reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User who last reviewed the compliance */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compliance status */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next compliance review */,
  "review_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the compliance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration setting that was audited */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., configuration change, regulatory review) */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date and time the audit was performed */,
  "audited_by" TEXT /* User who performed the audit */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the audit */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the audit */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_audits_audited_by FOREIGN KEY ("audited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_audits_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES frequency_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency the report is about */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for generating the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_reports_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)
